title: Techno Union scientist
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Nickname}} {{Character |type=CIS |image=[[File:Skakoanboss-CW25.jpg]] |name=Head Techno Union Scientist |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Nelvaan/Legends|Nelvaan]]{{CW|24}} |species=[[Skakoan/Legends|Skakoan]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] *[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Begin the final phase, and bring the last specimen forward. I will perform the procedure myself.|The Head Techno Union Scientist to an [[Combat engineer (Techno Union)/Legends|underling]]|}} A '''Techno Union scientist''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Skakoan/Legends|Skakoan]], and the lead [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] who managed the experiments performed on the [[Nelvaanian/Legends|Nelvaanians]] for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. He was killed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] during the [[Battle of Nelvaan]]. ==Biography== ===Experiments on Nelvaan=== {{Dialogue|Engineer|But sir, the brain modulations aren't fully integrated or tested yet; specimen control cannot be guaranteed.|Head Scientist|No matter. Grievous grows impatient; we must deliver the prototypes.|Engineer|But we're just not ready!|Main scientist|Our concerns are of little consequence to General Grievous.|attr=Combat engineer and the main scientist|src=}} [[File:Skakoan_bio_engineers.jpg|thumb|left|240px|The main Techno Union scientist commences to transform [[Harvos]].]] During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Skakoan served in the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] as a combat engineer. In 19 BBY, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], [[Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies/Legends|Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies]], assigned him to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Nelvaan,{{DB|location|nelvaan|Nelvaan}} where he became the leader of the [[Techno Union laboratory|local separatist facility]], accompanied by four other Skakoan combat engineers and an army of [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]] and [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]]. In order to keep the base powered, he constructed a [[siphon generator]], which absorbed the warmth from the planet while reducing the planet to a wintry state. He then moved his troops against [[Rokrul]], a local village populated by the native [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]], the Nelvaanians. The Skakoan ordered the droid army to empty the village of every adult male, leaving only the women and children.{{CW|23}} The Skakoans began experimenting on the captured Nelvaanians immediately. The purpose of their experimentations was to study the effectiveness of hybrid droid-organic technology, and also to convert the captive Nelvaanians into [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[mutant]] super-soldiers. Inspired by his own success as a cyborg, General Grievous planned to replace the battle droids with the mutant Nelvaanians. After being individually transformed into enormous mutant cyborgs, the Nelvaanians were fitted with mind-control collars. Grievous, impatient for his new soldiers, ordered the specimens to be delivered to him as soon as the [[Harvos|last Nelvaanian]] was transformed. ===Battle of Nelvaan=== {{Quote|Jedi! Unleash the specimen!''"
"''But they're not ready…''"
"''I said: unleash them!|Main Techno Union scientist and combat engineer, as [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] reveals himself|}} [[File:Nelvaan_ani.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Skakoan leader watches as Nelvaanians attack Skywalker.]] The Head scientist performed the last procedure himself watching as the Nelvaanian began to transform. However, [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] had penetrated the laboratory and defeated the droid perimeter guards. The main Techno Union scientist was shocked when he realized that a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] had entered his laboratory, and ordered his henchman to unleash the specimens under remote control. [[Unidentified Skakoan combat engineer|His underlings]] objected, saying that they weren't battle-ready yet, but the Head scientist ignored them, ordering the cyborg warriors to attack against Skywalker. The Head scientist watched as the mutant Nelvaanians attacked the Jedi, who tried in vain to convince them that he was not their enemy. However, the last specimen Harvos, whose control collar had not yet been fitted to him, was able to break out from his transformation chamber and show Skywalker that the control collars were the reason for the hostility of Nelvaanians. The Head scientist could only watch helplessly as Harvos and Skywalker freed all of the mutants from their collars. The specimens then started to rampage through the base, destroying battle droids and freeing their comrades, while Skywalker headed to destroy the siphon generator. Upon realizing that he himself was in mortal danger, the Head scientist fled to the exit of the base. He and his fellow Skakoans ran up the stairs that led outside, as the furious horde of Nelvaanians followed just behind them.{{CW|25}} ===Unsuccessful escape and death=== The Skakoans managed to reach their [[Hardcell-class interstellar transport/Legends|''Hardcell''-class interstellar transport]], which was located near the exit on the surface. However, Anakin Skywalker, who had just destroyed the siphon generator at the cost of his prosthetic arm, climbed towards the ship. The Skakoan underlings attempted to defend themselves, but the enraged Jedi Knight used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to disarm two of the engineers, whom he then [[Telekinesis/Legends|hurled]] into the horde of Nelvaanians. [[File:Skakoan.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The Head scientist flees from the base.]] The remaining scientists attempted to retreat, but were stopped when Skywalker destroyed the ramp to the ship. As a result of the destruction of the siphon generator, a geyser burst from the ground, killing the last of the Skakoans, except for the main scientist. While Skywalker had his back turned, the Skakoan pulled out a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] and aimed it at the Jedi Knight. Turning quickly, Skywalker spotted him and in his rage, used the Force to crush the [[Pressure suit/Legends|pressure suit]] of the helpless Skakoan. This caused an explosive decompression, which killed the Head scientist instantly. ===After death=== The death of the main Techno Union scientist and the destruction of the facility put an end to Grievous's plans for new elite soldiers. Anakin Skywalker left the planet with his [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] for new missions. However, the anger and mercilessness Skywalker had showed against the engineers pushed him closer to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. ==Personality and traits== [[File:AnakinKills.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The Head scientist dies at the hands of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]].]] {{Quote|Attack! Attack!|The Head scientist, to the mutated Nelvaanians|}} The Head scientist showed a callous lack of concern for the fate of the Nelvaanians and the cruel nature of the tests being performed on them, whom he viewed only as specimens. He was short-tempered and impatient, ignoring the warnings of his underlings and acting only under his own advice. ==Behind the scenes== The Head Techno Union scientist was voiced by [[Nick Jameson]]. The official name of this Skakoan is currently unknown. In the episode credits he is referred to as "'''Head Techno Union Scientist'''." Coloring errors were made during the animation of the main scientist's escape. Although his skin is blue, when he tries to escape and shoot Anakin, his skin is colored green like his underlings. When Anakin lifts him into air, his skin goes back to blue. {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Skakoan combat engineer boss|the Head Techno Union scientist}} ==Appearances== *{{CW|24}} {{1st}} *{{CW|25}} ==Sources== *{{DB|organization|technounion|Techno Union}} {{Po}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Skakoan combat engineer boss|the Head Techno Union scientist}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |fi=Skakoalainen taisteluinsinöörijohtaja |uk=Головний вчений Техносоюзу }} [[Category:Confederacy science and engineering personnel]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Skakoans]] [[Category:Techno Union members]]
